description: Canonical post-AH-PRD-09 trace for a delegate_to_specialist call. Used by MER-E extractor validation and fixture conformance tests. See docs/trace-structure-spec.md §14 for the authoritative spec.

summary.acceptance_criteria: Provide three distinct market opportunities with supporting evidence.

summary.specialist_output: Market opportunity analysis: (1) Emerging LATAM mid-market, (2) SMB automation tooling, (3) Vertical SaaS consolidation.
